summary: Shopify App packaging features fully tested. Backend: All 5 endpoints working (GET /api/shopify/app/info, POST webhooks for customers/data_request, customers/redact, shop/redact, app/uninstalled). Frontend: /shopify-app page loads correctly with hero, features grid, installation guide, GDPR section, API docs toggle. WebSocket regression check passed. 17/17 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/info returns 200 with app metadata
BACKEND: App info contains name='TrendScout', version='1.0.0'
BACKEND: App info contains 8 features list
BACKEND: App info contains required scopes (read_products, write_products, read_inventory, write_inventory)
BACKEND: App info contains GDPR endpoints mapping
BACKEND: App info contains webhooks mapping (app_uninstalled)
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/customers/data_request returns 200
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/customers/redact returns 200
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/shop/redact returns 200
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/webhooks/app/uninstalled returns 200
BACKEND: All GDPR webhooks return {status: 'ok'}
BACKEND: WebSocket endpoint /api/notifications/ws exists (regression check)
BACKEND: GET /api/notifications/ requires auth (regression check)
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page loads without errors
FRONTEND: Hero title 'TrendScout for Shopify' with data-testid='shopify-app-title'
FRONTEND: Shopify App badge visible
FRONTEND: Get Started Free button visible (logged out state)
FRONTEND: All 4 installation steps present (install-step-1 through install-step-4)
FRONTEND: 6 feature cards displayed
FRONTEND: GDPR & Compliance section with 3 cards
FRONTEND: API docs toggle button (data-testid='toggle-api-docs') works
FRONTEND: API docs table (data-testid='api-docs-table') shows/hides correctly
FRONTEND: API docs table contains 10 endpoint rows including all GDPR endpoints
FRONTEND: Connection status not shown for logged out users (expected)

verified_features.verification: Returns app metadata with name, version, features, scopes, GDPR endpoints, webhooks
GDPR customer data request webhook - logs to gdpr_requests collection
GDPR customer erasure webhook - marks request as completed
GDPR shop data erasure - deletes shopify_connections, platform_connections, exports, oauth_states
App lifecycle webhook - marks connections as uninstalled
Hero section, features grid, installation guide (4 steps), GDPR section, API docs toggle
Contains webhook subscriptions for GDPR and app/uninstalled, scopes, auth config

critical_code_review_comments: HMAC verification is skipped when SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET is not set (lines 48, 80, 119, 158) - correct for dev/test environments
All data-testid attributes properly implemented: shopify-app-title, connection-status, install-step-1-4, toggle-api-docs, api-docs-table
seed_data_creation: Test GDPR requests created in MongoDB gdpr_requests collection (using UUID-based shop domains)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopify App packaging features verified: (1) Backend shopify_app_router at /api/shopify/app/ with 5 endpoints - info, 3 GDPR webhooks, 1 lifecycle webhook. (2) GDPR webhooks skip HMAC verification when SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET not set. (3) Frontend /shopify-app public page with hero, 6 features, 4-step install guide, GDPR section, toggleable API docs table. (4) shopify.app.toml manifest ready for Shopify Partner Dashboard. (5) WebSocket notifications still working (regression verified).
